ideas.title: ⌘K command palette with client-side fuzzy full-text search
ideas.why: the cute terminal is not discovery — there is no way to actually search the 7 posts/pages, so ship a Vercel/Linear-style ⌘K palette over an Algolia-DocSearch-like prebuilt index emitted by ssg.py and fuzzy-matched in WASM.

ideas.title: Live "factory floor" — telemetry-driven animated pipeline
ideas.why: activity.json, deploy.json, router.json and spark.json are already emitted but only rendered as static vitals; animate them into a Datadog-live-map-style scene where each real ship flows a packet through the gate, turning telemetry into a memorable showpiece (distinct from the existing static knowledge graph).

ideas.title: Per-post generated OG social cards
ideas.why: ssg.py sets og:image to one static assets/og.png for every page, so every shared link looks identical — generate a unique card per post (title + reading time) the way Vercel OG does, so trendpost's 4x/day shares stand out in feeds.

ideas.title: "Ask the Factory" — RAG chat on the idle GB10 GPUs
ideas.why: both spark GB10s sit at 0% util with spark_today only 13, so stand up a small vLLM endpoint that answers visitor questions grounded in posts.json + summary logs — a genuinely novel interaction, but it needs a backend service and a CSP connect-src change.

ideas.title: Persist the theme choice to localStorage
ideas.why: `theme amber` sets data-theme but nothing saves it, so the picked theme silently resets on every reload — a real state bug, fix by writing/restoring from localStorage like every real theme switcher (GitHub, tailwindcss.com).

ideas.title: Reading-time + copy-permalink on each post
ideas.why: posts.json has 7 essays but no reading estimate or per-post share/anchor link, the two reading-UX affordances Medium and joshwcomeau.com make table stakes for a bookmarkable blog.
